articles.title: POL Price Soars 5% As Polygon Undergoes Major Upgrade
articles.description: POL, the native token of Polygon, experienced a 5% price surge following the network’s Ahmedabad upgrade, marking a significant step forward for the platform’s Proof-of-Stake (PoS) mainnet. The update is expected to improve the experience of both developers and users, which in turn will increase the usage of the network. Ahmedabad Upgrade Brings New Features

articles.title: Polygon’s 1019% network growth: Will it drive POL higher?
articles.description: Polygon shows strong network growth, indicating potential for higher prices ahead.

articles.title: Solana peaks all other chains with highest daily net flows
articles.description: As of September 26, Solana has the most positive net flows beating all other chains. The net flows of Solana currently stand at 1.0B over a period of 3 months. The data aggregator, Artemis.xyz shows that while Solana is at the top of net flows, Ethereum is at the bottom with a negative net flow […]

articles.title: Most Airdrop Tokens Crash Within Days, Study Shows
articles.description: A new study reveals that nearly 89% of airdrop tokens lose value within 90 days, with Ethereum and Solana showing the best resilience.

articles.title: BlackRock Sees Highest Monthly ETF Inflow as US Bitcoin Holdings Climb
articles.description: Bitcoin holdings in the United States are increasing, primarily driven by demand for BTC exchange-traded funds.
